title: Apply knowledge of relevant legislation to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply knowledge of relevant legislation to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research the relevant legislation

pcs.text: Identify and record the legislative requirements that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record the legislative requirements that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record the legislative requirements that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites work.

pcs.text: Identify and record the purpose of legislation requirements that apply to own work context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record the purpose of legislation requirements that apply to own work context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record the purpose of legislation requirements that apply to own work context.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Research the relevant legislation

elements.title: Identify relevant legislative provisions

pcs.text: Identify and record the laws that protect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record the laws that protect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record the laws that protect Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites.

pcs.text: Clarify compliance requirements with supervisor to confirm understanding and to ensure consistency of application across the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify compliance requirements with supervisor to confirm understanding and to ensure consistency of application across the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify compliance requirements with supervisor to confirm understanding and to ensure consistency of application across the organisation.

pcs.text: Consult with experts and Cultural Authorities to address any competing interests arising from diverse pieces of legislation with jurisdiction over a local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural site, landscape or material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with experts and Cultural Authorities to address any competing interests arising from diverse pieces of legislation with jurisdiction over a local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural site, landscape or material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with experts and Cultural Authorities to address any competing interests arising from diverse pieces of legislation with jurisdiction over a local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural site, landscape or material.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify relevant legislative provisions

elements.title: Identify stakeholder requirements

pcs.text: Communicate with clients and stakeholders to identify their needs in relation to relevant legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with clients and stakeholders to identify their needs in relation to relevant legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with clients and stakeholders to identify their needs in relation to relevant legislation.

pcs.text: Provide referrals for stakeholders to expert advisors or advisory organisations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide referrals for stakeholders to expert advisors or advisory organisations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide referrals for stakeholders to expert advisors or advisory organisations.

pcs.text: Recognise own limitations and professional boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise own limitations and professional boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise own limitations and professional boundaries.

pcs.text: Prepare a plan to conduct Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work in accordance with legislative requirements and following cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a plan to conduct Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work in accordance with legislative requirements and following cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a plan to conduct Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work in accordance with legislative requirements and following cultural protocols.
